title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates:
Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates!
